findings.claim: ADR-001 treats the SDKv2 VM resource path `proxmoxtf/resource/vm` as a live, currently-present premise in its migration priority list.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists in the repository (e.g. already migrated or restructured), the migration priority section is stale and should be revisited.

findings.claim: ADR-001 treats the SDKv2 Container resource path `proxmoxtf/resource/container` as a live, currently-present premise in its migration priority list.
findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists in the repository, the migration priority section is stale and should be revisited.

findings.claim: ADR-001 treats the multiplexer package `tf6muxserver` as a currently-used live dependency enabling dual-framework serving.

citations.quote: The provider currently uses a multiplexer (`tf6muxserver`) to serve both SDKv2 and Framework resources from a single binary, allowing gradual migration.

findings.consequence: If this package is no longer used/present in the manifest, the stated architecture premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-001 names the SDKv2 helper/schema import path as a live premise contributors must avoid, implying it is currently importable/present.
findings.consequence: If this dependency is no longer in the module graph, the warning is moot and the record has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-001 names the Framework schema import path as a live, currently-used dependency to be used instead of SDKv2.
findings.consequence: If this package path changed or is no longer the recommended import, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-001 treats `fwprovider/provider.go` as a live file where new resources/data sources are currently registered.

citations.quote: Resources are registered in `fwprovider/provider.go` via `Resources()` and `DataSources()` methods

findings.consequence: If this file has moved or been renamed, the registration guidance is stale.

findings.claim: ADR-001 treats `fwprovider/test/` as a live path currently holding shared test utilities.

citations.quote: acceptance tests colocated with resource; shared test utilities in `fwprovider/test/`

findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the testing guidance is stale.

findings.claim: ADR-002 treats `proxmox/api/client.go` as a live file implementing the base HTTP client.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists at this path, the layered architecture description is stale.

findings.claim: ADR-002 treats `proxmox/client.go` as a live file implementing the top-level client.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists at this path, the architecture description is stale.

findings.claim: ADR-002 treats `proxmox/cluster/client.go` as a live file example for a domain client.
findings.consequence: If this file has moved, the example reference is stale.

findings.claim: ADR-002 treats `proxmox/nodes/client.go` as a live file example for a domain client with a node parameter.
findings.consequence: If this file has moved, the example reference is stale.

findings.claim: ADR-002 treats the `go-querystring` package as a live, currently-used dependency for URL encoding behavior.

citations.quote: The `comma` modifier makes `go-querystring` serialize as a single `delete=field1,field2` parameter

findings.consequence: If this package is no longer a dependency (replaced by another encoder), the described serialization behavior premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR-003 treats `fwprovider/provider.go` as a live file where resources/data sources are currently registered.

citations.quote: New resources and data sources must be registered in `fwprovider/provider.go`:

findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists at this path, the registration instructions are stale.

findings.claim: ADR-003 treats `fwprovider/test/` as a live path currently holding shared test utilities.

citations.quote: Shared test utilities (provider factories, config rendering, assertion helpers) live in `fwprovider/test/`.

findings.consequence: If this path no longer exists, the test colocation guidance is stale.

findings.claim: ADR-004 treats `fwprovider/attribute/` as a live package currently providing the `attribute.ResourceID()` helper and pointer-conversion helpers.

citations.quote: Use the `attribute.ResourceID()` helper from `fwprovider/attribute/` to define the `id` attribute

findings.consequence: If this package/path no longer exists, the schema guidance referencing it is stale.

findings.claim: ADR-004 treats `fwprovider/validators/` as a live package currently providing project-specific validators.

citations.quote: Use project-specific validators from `fwprovider/validators/` for reusable domain rules (e.g., `validators.SDNID()`).

findings.consequence: If this package no longer exists, the validator guidance is stale.

findings.claim: ADR-004 treats `fwprovider/nodes/vm/{cpu,vga,rng}` schema packages as live paths currently carrying inherited Optional+Computed settings.

citations.quote: The current `fwprovider/nodes/vm/{cpu,vga,rng}` schemas carry `Optional+Computed` inherited from the SDK

findings.consequence: If these packages have since been refactored or moved, the conformance note is stale.
